text: What's on your mind right now, before you do anything else?
What did today actually feel like — not what happened, but how it felt?
What's something you're avoiding, and what's underneath that?
If today had a title, what would it be?
What surprised you today?
What's taking up the most space in your head this week?
What would you tell a friend who had the day you just had?
Name three small things that went right today.
Who made your day a little easier, and how?
What's something ordinary you'd miss if it were gone?
What part of today are you glad you didn't skip?
What's a comfort you reached for today?
Describe a moment from today you want to remember in a year.
What's a smell, song, or taste that brought something back recently?
Write about a place you keep returning to in your mind.
What's a small tradition you have, and where did it come from?
What did you learn the hard way recently?
What's something you handled better than you would have a year ago?
What's a habit you're trying to build or break, and how's it going?
What did you say no to lately, and how did it feel?
What's one thing you'd do differently if today repeated?
Who did you think about today, and why?
Is there a conversation you've been meaning to have?
When did you feel most connected to someone recently?
What's something you appreciate about a person close to you?
What are you looking forward to, even a little?
What's one small thing you can do tomorrow for the version of you a week out?
If nothing were in the way, what would you start?
What do you want more of in your days?
What's a worry you can set down for tonight?
How did your body feel today, honestly?
What gave you energy today, and what drained it?
When did you feel most awake today?
What's an idea you can't quite shake?
Describe something you saw today as if no one had ever seen it before.
What would you make if you had a free afternoon and no judgment?
What's something you noticed today that you usually don't?
Where did your mind go when it wandered today?
What does 'enough' look like for you right now?
What can you let be unfinished tonight?
What's a win — any size — from the last 24 hours?
What's something you did that your past self would be proud of?
What got easier recently that used to be hard?
What's something true that you haven't said out loud?
What are you pretending not to know?
What do you need that you haven't asked for?
Just write — no prompt. What wants to come out?
Pick up where yesterday's thoughts left off.
